pr.title: SmearGate + BigramHash + Int6 + SWA + U-Net Skips (1.1518 BPB)

output.summary: 11-layer GPT mixes per-row int6 quantization, SmearGate+BigramHash context, learned U-Net skips, and SWA-tuned Muon training evaluated via sliding windows.
techniques: Per-row int6 quantization + zstd-22 compression for transformer weights
SmearGate/BigramHash context signals with U-Net style skip connections across 11 layers
Muon optimizer with momentum warmup and infrequent SWA paired with sliding-window eval
